title: astragalus richii
intro: Astragalus richii, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a type of perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of northern China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, immunomodulatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus richii include improving immune function, reducing stress and fatigue, and potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Astragalus richii can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or extract, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
